rule_metadata.name: tunneller
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'tunneller' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule tunneller
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'tunneller' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "tunneller"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /\/tunneller\.git/ nocase ascii wide
		$string2 = "/tunneller/releases/" nocase ascii wide
		$string3 = "/tunneller-darwin-amd64"
		$string4 = "/tunneller-darwin-amd64"
		$string5 = "/tunneller-darwin-amd64"
		$string6 = "/tunneller-darwin-amd64"
		$string7 = "/tunneller-darwin-i386"
		$string8 = "/tunneller-darwin-i386"
		$string9 = "/tunneller-darwin-i386"
		$string10 = "/tunneller-darwin-i386"
		$string11 = "/tunneller-freebsd-amd64" nocase ascii wide
		$string12 = "/tunneller-freebsd-amd64" nocase ascii wide
		$string13 = "/tunneller-freebsd-amd64" nocase ascii wide
		$string14 = "/tunneller-freebsd-amd64" nocase ascii wide
		$string15 = "/tunneller-freebsd-i386" nocase ascii wide
		$string16 = "/tunneller-freebsd-i386" nocase ascii wide
		$string17 = "/tunneller-freebsd-i386" nocase ascii wide
		$string18 = "/tunneller-freebsd-i386" nocase ascii wide
		$string19 = "/tunneller-linux-amd64"
		$string20 = "/tunneller-linux-amd64"
		$string21 = "/tunneller-linux-amd64"
		$string22 = "/tunneller-linux-amd64"
		$string23 = "/tunneller-linux-i386"
		$string24 = "/tunneller-linux-i386"
		$string25 = "/tunneller-linux-i386"
		$string26 = "/tunneller-linux-i386"
		$string27 = "087dae4b718907c400d19d3e497619042ad74036da714be2812ab423e0a86e84" nocase ascii wide
		$string28 = "1556d7d7fe7f2342854a24b05c3eca7e593d7e22021c559118c3fde32950bfd0" nocase ascii wide

		$string53 = "Launch the client, exposing a local service to the internet" nocase ascii wide
		$string54 = "skx/tunneller" nocase ascii wide
		$string55 = "You must specify the local host:port to expose" nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
